etymology.description: 𡿧 (disaster; floods) + 日 (sun) -> the flood submerging the sun -> former times
etymology.interpretation: The image of floods submerging the sun suggests a long gone past, as such events feel remote and ancient. This imagery naturally leads to the meaning of 'past'.

examples.chinese: 昔日的朋友(昔日的朋友)现在变得陌生(現在變得陌生)。
examples.pinyin: Xīrì de péngyǒu xiànzài biàn dé mòshēng.
examples.english: Friends from the past have now become strangers.

examples.chinese: 他常常回忆昔年的光辉岁月(他常常回憶昔年的光輝歲月)。
examples.pinyin: Tā chángcháng huíyì xīnián de guānghuī suìyuè.
examples.english: He often reminisces about the glorious years of the past.

examples.chinese: 这座城市过去是个小村庄(這座城市過去是個小村莊)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè zuò chéngshì guòqù shì gè xiǎo cūnzhuāng.
examples.english: This city used to be a small village in the past.
